MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivial Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5931 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SOFI CONSUMER LOAN PROGRAM GRANTOR TRUST 2016-3's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff Sofi Consumer Loan Program Grantor Trust 2016-3's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment against defendant Taylor Wynne is the amount of $74,892.14 plus costs of $1,089.05.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
